name: simplex-noise - NPM
snippet: simplex-noise.js is a simplex noise implementation in Javascript/TypeScript. It works in the browser and Node.js, using CommonJS and ES Modules.

name: I cannot generate smooth Simplex noise in Javascript - Stack Overflow
snippet: Try sampling simplexNoise.GenerateSimplexNoise(x * 0.05, y * 0.05, 5, 0.5) The problem may be that your samples are too far apart. name: GitHub - josephg/noisejs: Javascript 2D Perlin & Simplex noise functions
snippet: This is a simple library for 2d & 3d perlin noise and simplex noise in javascript. Noise is pretty. The library is pretty fast (10M queries / sec).
